latest.title: Birds see ultraviolet patterns we miss
latest.script_key: birds reveal the ultraviolet vision first watch closely because many birds see ultraviolet detail hidden from us that extra color can help with mates food and navigation the same scene is richer to them than it is to us which bird fact next

latest.title: Monkeys wash food when grit gets annoying
latest.script_key: monkeys can change habits to solve small problems watch the hands near the food because some monkeys learn useful routines from their group washing or handling food differently can remove grit and make eating easier the habit spreads because it works which primate trick should come next

latest.title: Storm clouds reveal a storm's heat engine
latest.script_key: storm clouds show where a storm is feeding watch the spiral shape because warm ocean air rises near the center and releases heat as clouds build rotation organizes that energy into bands from above the storm is not random it is an engine which satellite clue next

latest.title: Beetles can steer by the Milky Way
latest.script_key: beetles can use the night sky like a compass watch the straight path because some dung beetles use sky patterns to keep from circling back into rivals that celestial shortcut helps a tiny insect roll food away fast would you expect a beetle to use astronomy

latest.title: Elephants cool blood through giant ears
latest.script_key: elephants use their ears as living radiators watch the ear surface because warm blood flows through those broad veins moving air can dump heat before it spreads through the body that is why the ears are more than decoration in hot places which giant animal trick next

latest.title: Magnets make invisible fields visible
latest.script_key: magnets can show a hidden force map watch the filings line up because each tiny piece becomes a small magnet in the field together they trace the direction of the force around the magnet the pattern is physics drawing itself which force next

latest.story_id: Coral reefs are cities built by tiny animals
reasons: editorial score is below publish threshold
latest.title: Coral reefs are cities built by tiny animals
latest.script_key: coral reefs reveal the reef city first watch closely because coral animals build hard skeletons that stack into habitat fish algae and countless small creatures then use that structure like a city the color sits on top of engineering which habitat next now the reef city at the start makes sense

latest.title: steam tells the real volcano story
latest.script_key: steam s not just smoke it s fresh magma water boiling off watch the steam plume twist that s gas escaping the molten rock that s why the crater stays cool enough to stand near ever seen a volcano without steam me neither

latest.title: Volcano craters aren't the dark side of the moon
latest.script_key: watch this one twice that dark curve isn t a shadow it s the crater rim because the moon s dark side is a misnomer it gets just as much sunlight that s why these craters look like alien moonscapes did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Fitz Roy's jagged peak is younger than your grandma
latest.script_key: fitz roy s jagged spire looks ancient but it s a baby only 10 million years old see those vertical stripes that s where glaciers scraped away the softer rock leaving the hard stuff standing that s why it looks like a knife s edge ever touch a layer cake and wonder what s inside that s fitz roy

latest.title: Mountains are wearing themselves down faster than you think
latest.script_key: here s the part nobody tells you mountains aren t just standing there getting shorter they re actively melting see those jagged ridges rain and snow soak into cracks dissolve the rock and wash it away that s why alpine valleys are always widening

latest.title: Bears don't just swim for fun at Alaska lakes
latest.script_key: these two bears aren t splashing around they re hunting watch the one on the left it s actually diving that s why they swim so far fish are hiding deeper than you think i love how they time their dives with the lake s ripples what would you do if you had to hunt like that

latest.title: Painted elephants aren't what you think in India
latest.script_key: watch closely at the paint splashes they re not decoration they re camouflage elephants in india get painted to avoid poachers who mistake them for tusked males that s why the bright colors actually blend into the forest did you learn this wrong too

latest.title: Forests can cool the air below them
latest.script_key: forests can cool the air below them watch the shade and mist because leaves block direct sun and release water vapor that combination can make the forest floor feel like a different climate the canopy is a cooling machine not just cover which forest layer next
